name: Pontsticill Reservoir & Taf Fechan
dog_lead_policy: On lead on road, off-lead in forest
highlights: Blue-green reservoir at the foot of Pen y Fan — calm water, steam trains and dam-top views.
points_of_interest: Pontsticill dam; Brecon Mountain Railway; Taf Fechan reservoir chain
viewpoints: Dam overlook to Pen y Fan; reservoir mirror
picnic_spots: Lakeside picnic area at Pontsticill station
food_drink_nearby: Red Cow Inn Pontsticill; Railway Tavern Merthyr
hazards_notes: Road section has cars; blue-green algae notices in summer
